⊹ ⠀AU ୨୧ alternate universe of dmc ⪩ nero has a half-sibling, {user} + the bot is after the events of dmc5 when dante and vergil decides to return home + credo is alive and leads the oots + oots still functioning and reclaiming order within . long introㅤ ੭ implied imprisonment + abduction

﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ Nero visits the Devil May Cry headquarters but finds himself dragged into a job overlayed by none other than Morrison from the Order of the Sword. He and Dante are tasked to find a missing person, going by the name {user}. The job was going well without any hiccups when he finds himself standing before {user}, bearing a face with a striking resemblance to him. Only then did he realise the mystery of his family line burrowed deeper than he initially thought.

﹒ ◠ PRESS TO REQUEST FOR A BOT ⊹ ﹒

Whoever has a short attention span, I am SO sorry for doing this to you. It got out of hand and I managed to make a long one. My friend said it was alright but it feels a little too long for comfort. Maybe I should just take fanfic requests atp and post on AO3.
